creator: tobi@byte23.de
text:
Write speed on Seagate Barracuda ES.2 SATA-II disk is slower than 20MB/s. I am using AES encryption via GBDE. 

Here is a bonnie benchmark of the disk (ad6):

              -------Sequential Output-------- ---Sequential Input-- --Random--
              -Per Char- --Block--- -Rewrite-- -Per Char- --Block--- --Seeks---
Machine    MB K/sec %CPU K/sec %CPU K/sec %CPU K/sec %CPU K/sec %CPU  /sec %CPU
         2000 16892 14.0 12441  2.2  6510  1.4 31599 27.0 43091  4.2 435.8  1.1



This is dmesg:
